task_completion.description: Open the original Maintenance Log project
task_completion.visual_evidence: A project management application is open displaying the 'Maintenance Log' tasks, showing a mix of completed and incomplete work orders.

task_completion.description: Identify and select the 100% completed tasks
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tasks showing 100% completion status are highlighted, selected, or filtered in the application.

task_completion.description: Move the completed tasks into a new project
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new project window or tab is open, and the previously selected 100% completed tasks have been pasted or moved into it.

task_completion.description: Save the new project as archive.xml
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager shows the new project being saved exactly as 'archive.xml' in the '/home/ga/Projects/' directory.

task_completion.description: Ensure the original project contains only incomplete tasks
task_completion.visual_evidence: The original project view is visible and no longer contains any tasks with 100% completion (only tasks with less than 100% progress remain).

task_completion.description: Save the modified original project as active_log.xml
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager shows the modified original project being saved exactly as 'active_log.xml' in the '/home/ga/Projects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical project management application to manipulate the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application (e.g., Planner, GanttProject) rather than terminal commands (like grep, sed, or python scripts) to process the XML files.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the XML files directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen opening the .xml files in text editors like VS Code, gedit, or nano to manually cut and paste XML tags.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's save functionality to create the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application's 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog boxes are used to generate archive.xml and active_log.xml, rather than simply renaming files in the file explorer or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source project file is located at /home/ga/Projects/samples/maintenance_log.xml. The agent must save the project containing ONLY 100% completed tasks to /home/ga/Projects/archive.xml, and the project containing ONLY incomplete tasks to /home/ga/Projects/active_log.xml. Verify these exact filenames and paths in the save dialogs or file manager.
